_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of how to structure and display data.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts, understanding data sources, recognizing misleading visualizations, and applying basic statistical reasoning.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.539), AB-K-002 (AB, cosine: 0.538).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.549). Shared vocabulary: [data, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [display, structure] vs WIDAI-only terms [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, literacy] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.926, R=0.882). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of how to structure and display data." and "Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.543 ≈ STS 0.549 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [data, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [display, structure]. WIDAI-only: [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, literacy].
